BuildPowerGeneratorStep1.title: Build a power generator
BuildPowerGeneratorStep1.description:
Now your crew has finished expanding the ship, they are going to need some power.

First select the highlighted [color=PURPLE]Power[/color] button in the [color=PURPLE]Building[/color] menu.

BuildPowerGeneratorStep2.description: Now select the highlighted [color=PURPLE]Power Generator[/color] button.

BuildPowerGeneratorStep3.description:
More information will now be shown below. Including the fuel type and skills required.

You can also select the primary and secondary materials used to build this, though the defaults should be fine for now.
If the numbers are [color=RED]red[/color], this is because all of our materials are off the ship.

Place this within your ship on any available floor space.
